nodes.name: Webhook (POST /webhook/...)
nodes.notes: URL is referenced by the website via vercel.json (/api/lead -> this). Responds 200 immediately so the site shows success; the rest of the flow runs async.

nodes.name: Email report to prospect
nodes.notes: Swap for the Microsoft Outlook node if you'd rather send via Microsoft 365. Set the 'From' to support@automationbuilders.ai.

nodes.name: Notify team (booking)
nodes.notes: Calendly handles the actual scheduling. This just alerts the team with the prep data the prospect already entered.

meta.description: Receives website leads (email-report + booking) and emails the report / pings Slack. Webhook path matches the site's vercel.json proxy.
